word: G5497 - χειραγωγός - cheiragōgós - khi-rag-o-gos' - Some to lead by the hand

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: Some to lead by the hand

χειραγωγός - cheiragōgos - khi-rag-o-gos'

From G5495 and a reduplicated form of G71; a hand leader, that is, personal conductor (of a blind person): - some to lead by the hand.
